# Placeholder Packet Manifest Scaffold

Placeholder, synthetic, non-donor scaffold only.

Reserved placeholder slots for a future separately authorized packet:

- SM05 authorization decision placeholder.
- authorization label placeholder.
- authorization rationale placeholder.
- exact authorized packet count placeholder.
- exact authorized C-family pressure routes placeholder.
- named authorization owner placeholder.
- packet identity placeholder.
- donor source identity placeholder with no donor excerpt.
- donor-family classification placeholder.
- extraction run identity placeholder.
- page/range truth placeholder.
- source hash or hash-later policy placeholder.
- evidence references placeholder with no donor content.
- C-family routing targets placeholder.
- SM04 review handoff target placeholder.

This manifest scaffold is not converted content, not training data, not canon, not sourcebook prose, and not runtime import data.
